heading: RAILROAD RETIREMENT ACT OF 1935
label: II RAILROAD RETIREMENT ACT OF 1935
notes: CodificationThis subchapter was comprised of , §§ 1–14, to 973, known as the Railroad Retirement Act of 1935, and was amended in its entirety and completely revised by , . The act, as amended and revised, was redesignated the Railroad Retirement Act of 1937 and was classified to subchapter III of this chapter. The Railroad Retirement Act of 1935 continued in effect with respect to individuals granted annuities prior to enactment of the Railroad Retirement Act of 1937. It was specifically amended by , , and by , §§ 2, 3, .act Aug. 29, 1935, ch. 81249 Stat. 967act June 24, 1937, ch. 38250 Stat. 307act June 11, 1940, ch. 307, § 254 Stat. 264act Aug. 13, 1940, ch. 66454 Stat. 785
